Many big caves of stone, piled high like cliffs—but made by man, not wind or water.<[silence:90ms]> Inside, fire burns without smoke, light glows without sun, and many tribes live stacked like bees in a hive.<[silence:90ms]> Hard paths of black rock twist between them, filled with fast-moving herds of strange beasts (no fur, loud roars).<[silence:90ms]> Air smells sharp, like wet ash and rot, but no trees grow—only hard, flat ground.<[silence:90ms]> Crowds move like ants after rain, never stopping, always carrying things not for eating.<[silence:90ms]> This is City.<[silence:90ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you City.

Many big caves of stone, piled high like cliffs—but made by man, not wind or water. Inside, fire burns without smoke, light glows without sun, and many tribes live stacked like bees in a hive. Hard paths of black rock twist between them, filled with fast-moving herds of strange beasts (no fur, loud roars). Air smells sharp, like wet ash and rot, but no trees grow—only hard, flat ground. Crowds move like ants after rain, never stopping, always carrying things not for eating. This is City.
